eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Wheeler, OR; at 12:48 PM on JUL 18, 2026 Effective until 1:48 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Level 3 - GO NOW - Evacuate immediately from Cove Creek Fire, East of the Jefferson County Line, North of Clarno Rd, South of Hwy 218.. 
Nivel 3 - VAYASE AHORA - Evacue inmediatamente de Cove Creek Fire, East of the Jefferson County Line, North of Clarno Rd, South of Hwy 218..
